config.title: Kreator wyrobu #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50111" #include "50222" #include "50203" #include "50523" #include "50509"
#define MAX_INDENT 7
dim g_oRootMaterialTree : set g_oRootMaterialTree = nothing dim g_idRootReceptura : g_idRootReceptura = 0 dim g_eCenaMode : g_eCenaMode = clng(CENA_MODE_OST_ZAKUP)
function c##CTRLID_EDITCENA##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_EDITCENA##_ondataentered = true dim pTableRow : set pTableRow = pCtrl.parent.parent dim oMaterialNode : set oMaterialNode = g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(pTableRow.userprop.prop(1)) oMaterialNode.cena = ccur(varValue) end function
function c##CTRLID_EDITILOSC##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_EDITILOSC##_ondataentered = true dim pTableRow : set pTableRow = pCtrl.parent.parent dim oMaterialNode : set oMaterialNode = g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(pTableRow.userprop.prop(1)) oMaterialNode.ilosc = ccur(varValue) end function
function c##CTRLID_TEXTWARTOSC##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_TEXTWARTOSC##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_TOTALWARTOSC##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_TOTALWARTOSC##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_EDITCENA##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_EDITCENA##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_EDITILOSC##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_EDITILOSC##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_TEXTWARTOSC##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_TEXTWARTOSC##_ongetdata = true dim pTableRow : set pTableRow = pCtrl.parent.parent update_row pTableRow,g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(pTableRow.userprop.prop(1)) end function
function c##CTRLID_TOTALWARTOSC##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_TOTALWARTOSC##_ongetdata = true dim oMaterialNode : set oMaterialNode = g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(1) pCtrl.text = doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(oMaterialNode.wartosc), _ getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot) end function
function c##CTRLID_CENAMODE##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_CENAMODE##_ongetdata = true pCtrl.value = g_eCenaMode end function
function c##CTRLID_CENAMODE##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_CENAMODE##_ondataentered = true if g_eCenaMode <> varValue then g_eCenaMode = varValue update_cena g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(1) end if end function
function remove_element_hli(byref pHLI) 'TODO: kontrolki ilosc/cena parent są ukryte jesli usuwamy ostatnie dziecko
dim idMN : idMN = clng(pHLI.prop(2)) dim oMaterialNode : set oMaterialNode = g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(idMN)
remove_mn oMaterialNode
dim idRow : idRow = clng(pHLI.prop(1)) dim pRow : set pRow = page_.ctrl(idRow)
dim nIndent : nIndent = pRow.userprop.prop(3) dim pNextRow : set pNextRow = pRow.nextelement dim pLastRow : set pLastRow = nothing do while not pNextRow is nothing if pNextRow.userprop.prop(3) <= nIndent then exit do end if set pLastRow = pNextRow set pNextRow = pNextRow.nextelement loop dim pSection : set pSection = pRow.parent if not pLastRow is nothing then set pNextRow = pRow.nextelement do while true pSection.remove pNextRow if pNextRow is pLastRow then exit do end if set pNextRow = pNextRow.nextelement loop end if pSection.remove pRow end function
function expcol_hli(byref pHLI) dim pPicture : set pPicture = page_.ctrl(clng(pHLI.prop(PROPC_CONTROL))) dim idRow : idRow = clng(pHLI.prop(2))
if pPicture.image = PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS then pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS) pPicture.tip = "Zwiń" dim oMaterialNode : set oMaterialNode = g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(pHLI.prop(1)) rebuild_from_mn oMaterialNode,page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TREE_TABLE),idRow else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS) pPicture.tip = "Rozwiń" dim pRow : set pRow = page_.ctrl(idRow)
dim nIndent : nIndent = pRow.userprop.prop(3) dim pNextRow : set pNextRow = pRow.nextelement dim pLastRow : set pLastRow = nothing do while not pNextRow is nothing if pNextRow.userprop.prop(3) <= nIndent then exit do end if set pLastRow = pNextRow set pNextRow = pNextRow.nextelement loop if not pLastRow is nothing then dim pSection : set pSection = pRow.parent set pNextRow = pRow.nextelement do while true pSection.remove pNextRow if pNextRow is pLastRow then exit do end if set pNextRow = pNextRow.nextelement loop end if
end if end function
function add_choose_product_hli(byref pHLI) dim pM60271 : set pM60271 = doc_.getmodule(60271) dim nLP dim pProdukt set pProdukt = pM60271.choose_produkt_obj("eAktywny=N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY and prod_cWyrob='1'", "strNazwa", nLP) if pProdukt is nothing then exit function end if
dim oParentMN : set oParentMN = g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(clng(pHLI.prop(1)))
dim oCMN : set oCMN = oParentMN.add_new_component() with oCMN .idprodukt = pProdukt.idobj .idopak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1).idobj .ilosc = ccur(1.0)
dim idReceptura,curIloscWyrobu
if query_default_receptura_for_wyrob(.idprodukt,.idopak, _ idReceptura,curIloscWyrobu) then build_mn_from_receptura trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,idReceptura), oCMN end if end with dim pTable : set pTable = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TREE_TABLE) dim pTableRow : set pTableRow = page_.ctrl(clng(pHLI.prop(2))) rebuild_row pTableRow,oCMN
build_add_item_row oParentMN,pTable,pTableRow.ident
end function
function fopen() set g_oRootMaterialTree = doc_.system.activex("eb5prod.material_tree")
g_idRootReceptura = trans_.var(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ)
dim pReceptura : set pReceptura = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,g_idRootReceptura) dim oTopMN : set oTopMN = g_oRootMaterialTree.new_root() oTopMN.ilosc = ccur(1.0) build_mn_from_receptura pReceptura,oTopMN update_cena g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(1) rebuild_from_mn g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(1),page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TREE_TABLE),-1
if not doc_.getmodule(60253).gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(true) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SR_CENA_MAG).disable = true end if fopen = true end function
function fok() dim pReceptura : set pReceptura = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,g_idRootReceptura) update_receptura pReceptura,g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(1)
page_.result = 1 page_.goback end function
function fcancel() page_.goback end function
function update_receptura(byref pReceptura,byref oMaterialNode) pReceptura.listSurowce.deleteall pReceptura.listCzynnosci.deleteall
dim iter dim oCMN dim pPozReceptura dim pProdukt dim pOpak
for iter = 0 to oMaterialNode.get_component_count() - 1 set oCMN = oMaterialNode.get_component(iter) set pPozReceptura = pReceptura.listSurowce.addnew() with pPozReceptura set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oCMN.idprodukt) set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(oCMN.idopak)) .pProdukt = pProdukt .pOpak = pOpak .curIloscOpak = ccur(oCMN.ilosc) end with next
for iter = 0 to oMaterialNode.get_service_count() - 1 set oCMN = oMaterialNode.get_service(iter) set pPozReceptura = pReceptura.listCzynnosci.addnew() with pPozReceptura set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oCMN.idprodukt) set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(oCMN.idopak)) .pProdukt = pProdukt .pOpak = pOpak .curIloscOpak = ccur(oCMN.ilosc) end with next end function
function rebuild_row(byref pTableRow,byref oMaterialNode) pTableRow.removeall set pTableRow.userprop = doc_.createhli() pTableRow.userprop.prop(1) = clng(oMaterialNode.ident) pTableRow.userprop.prop(3) = clng(oMaterialNode.level)
dim iter for iter = 1 to clng(oMaterialNode.level - 1) pTableRow.addnew CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1 next
dim pTCPicture : set pTCPicture = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1)
if oMaterialNode.has_children() then dim pPicturePlus : set pPicturePlus = pTCPicture.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) with pPicturePlus .image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS) .tip = "Rozwiń" set .hli = doc_.createhlistr(doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "varFunctionHLI='expcol_hli' vn1=%1 vn2=%2") _ (clng(oMaterialNode.ident))(pTableRow.ident).Done()) end with else pTCPicture.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = " " end if
dim pTCName set pTCName = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) pTCName.colspan = MAX_INDENT - clng(oMaterialNode.level)
dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTCName.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1)
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oMaterialNode.idprodukt) dim pOpak : set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(oMaterialNode.idopak)) pStatic.text = pProdukt.text
dim pTCIlosc set pTCIlosc = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1)
dim pEditIlosc set pEditIlosc = pTCIlosc.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY,-1)
with pEditIlosc .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_EDITILOSC) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .unit = pOpak.pJednOpak.strSkrot .precision = pOpak.pJednOpak.nDokladnosc - 1 end with
dim pTCCena set pTCCena = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1)
dim pEditCena set pEditCena = pTCCena.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY,-1)
with pEditCena .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_EDITCENA) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .precision = 2 .unit = getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot end with
dim pTCWartosc set pTCWartosc = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) pTCWartosc.align = ALIGN_RIGHT dim pStWartosc set pStWartosc = pTCWartosc.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) with pStWartosc .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_TEXTWARTOSC) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
dim pTCUdzial set pTCUdzial = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) pTCUdzial.align = ALIGN_RIGHT dim pStUdzial set pStUdzial = pTCUdzial.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1)
dim pTCOper set pTCOper = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) dim pPictRemove : set pPictRemove = pTCOper.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE,-1) with pPictRemove .image = CLng(PICTURE_REMOVE_FILE) .width = SIZE_FOR_GRID .height = SIZE_FOR_GRID .tip = "Usuń" set .hli=doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "remove_element_hli" .hli.prop(1) = clng(pTableRow.ident) .hli.prop(2) = clng(oMaterialNode.ident) end with end function
function build_add_item_row(byref oParentMN,byref pTable,byref idRow) dim pTableRow set pTableRow = pTable.body.insertnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,idRow,-1) set pTableRow.userprop = doc_.createhli() with pTableRow.userprop .prop(1) = clng(0) .prop(3) = clng(oParentMN.level + 1) end with
idRow = pTableRow.ident
dim iter for iter = 0 to clng(oParentMN.level) pTableRow.addnew CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1 next
dim pTCSeparator set pTCSeparator = pTableRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) pTCSeparator.colspan = MAX_INDENT - clng(oParentMN.level) + 5 - 1
pTCSeparator.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1).text = " "
dim pPicturePlus : set pPicturePlus = pTCSeparator.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) with pPicturePlus .image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) .tip = "Dodaj składnik" set .hli = doc_.createhlistr( _ doc_.afc.convert.formatter("varFunctionHLI='add_choose_product_hli' vn1=%1 vn2=%2") _ (oParentMN.ident)(idRow).Done()) end with end function
function update_row(byref pTableRow,byref oMaterialNode) pTableRow.cell(oMaterialNode.level + 2).element(1).value = ccur(oMaterialNode.ilosc) pTableRow.cell(oMaterialNode.level + 3).element(1).value = ccur(oMaterialNode.cena)
pTableRow.cell(oMaterialNode.level + 4).element(1).text = _ doc_.afc.display.money(ccur(oMaterialNode.wartosc), _ getCurrentFirma().pWaluta.strSkrot)
dim curUdzial : curUdzial = ccur(0.0) dim curTotalWartosc curTotalWartosc = ccur(g_oRootMaterialTree.get_node(1).wartosc) if curTotalWartosc <> 0 then curUdzial = 100 * ccur(oMaterialNode.wartosc) / curTotalWartosc end if
pTableRow.cell(oMaterialNode.level + 5).element(1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(curUdzial,"%") end function
function rebuild_from_mn(byref oParentMN,byref pTable,byval idRow) dim iter dim pTableRow
for iter = 0 to oParentMN.get_component_count() - 1 set pTableRow = pTable.body.insertnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,idRow,-1)
rebuild_row pTableRow,oParentMN.get_component(iter)
idRow = pTableRow.ident next
for iter = 0 to oParentMN.get_service_count() - 1 set pTableRow = pTable.body.insertnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW,idRow,-1) rebuild_row pTableRow,oParentMN.get_service(iter) idRow = pTableRow.ident next
build_add_item_row oParentMN,pTable,idRow
end function
function build_mn_from_receptura(byref pReceptura,byref oParentMN) dim oCMN dim idReceptura dim curIloscWyrobu
dim pSurowiec for each pSurowiec in pReceptura.listSurowce set oCMN = oParentMN.add_new_component() with oCMN .idprodukt = pSurowiec.pProdukt.idobj .idopak = pSurowiec.pOpak.idobj .ilosc = pSurowiec.curIloscOpak
if query_default_receptura_for_wyrob(.idprodukt,.idopak, _ idReceptura,curIloscWyrobu) then build_mn_from_receptura trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,idReceptura), oCMN end if
end with next dim pCzynnosc for each pCzynnosc in pReceptura.listCzynnosci set oCMN = oParentMN.add_new_service() with oCMN .idprodukt = pCzynnosc.pProdukt.idobj .idopak = pCzynnosc.pOpak.idobj .ilosc = pCzynnosc.curIloscOpak
if query_default_receptura_for_wyrob(.idprodukt,.idopak, _ idReceptura,curIloscWyrobu) then build_mn_from_receptura trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,idReceptura), oCMN end if
end with next end function
function remove_mn(byref oMaterialNode) 'remove children first do while oMaterialNode.get_component_count() > 0 remove_mn oMaterialNode.get_component(0) loop do while oMaterialNode.get_service_count() > 0 remove_mn oMaterialNode.get_service(0) loop 'remove itself dim oParentMN : set oParentMN = oMaterialNode.parent oParentMN.remove_component_on_ident(oMaterialNode.ident) oParentMN.remove_service_on_ident(oMaterialNode.ident) end function
function update_cena(byref oParentMN) dim iter dim oMaterialNode for iter = 0 to oParentMN.get_component_count() - 1 set oMaterialNode = oParentMN.get_component(iter) oMaterialNode.cena = get_cena_kalkulacyjna(oMaterialNode.idprodukt,oMaterialNode.idopak) if oMaterialNode.has_children() then update_cena oMaterialNode end if next for iter = 0 to oParentMN.get_service_count() - 1 set oMaterialNode = oParentMN.get_service(iter) oMaterialNode.cena = get_cena_kalkulacyjna(oMaterialNode.idprodukt,oMaterialNode.idopak) if oMaterialNode.has_children() then update_cena oMaterialNode end if next end function
function get_cena_kalkulacyjna(byval idProdukt,byval idOpak) get_cena_kalkulacyjna = ccur(0.0) dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdukt) dim curKwotaIn dim pWalutaIn dim curKwotaOut
if pProdukt.eRodzaj = N5PRODUKT_USLUGA then curKwotaIn = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1).curCenaNetto1 set pWalutaIn = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(1).pWaluta if not kantor(curKwotaIn, pWalutaIn, getCurrentFirma().pWaluta, _ trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY), N5KURSWALUT_SPRZEDAZY, curKwotaOut) then curKwotaOut = curKwotaIn end if
get_cena_kalkulacyjna = curKwotaOut else dim rs select case g_eCenaMode case CENA_MODE_OST_ZAKUP 'ostatnia cena zakupu dim idWalutaIn if not get_ost_cena_zakupu(idProdukt,idOpak,curKwotaIn,idWalutaIn) then exit function end if set pWalutaIn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,idWalutaIn)
if not kantor(curKwotaIn, pWalutaIn, getCurrentFirma().pWaluta, _ trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY), N5KURSWALUT_SPRZEDAZY, curKwotaOut) then curKwotaOut = curKwotaIn end if
get_cena_kalkulacyjna = curKwotaOut case CENA_MODE_SREDNIA_MAG 'sr. cena mag set rs = trans_.createadors( _ "select isnull(sum(r##ound(gms_curIlosc * gms_curCena,2)),0),isnull(sum(gms_curIlosc),0) from n5gmstan " +_ " where gms_pProd=" + cstr(idProdukt) + " and gms_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpak)) if rs.EOF then exit function end if dim curWartoscGM : curWartoscGM = ccur(rs(0)) dim curIloscGM : curIloscGM = ccur(rs(1)) if curIloscGM = 0.0 then exit function end if
get_cena_kalkulacyjna = trans_.afc.convert.round2(ccur(curWartoscGM/curIloscGM))
end select end if end function

page.body:
Nazwa
Ilość
Cena
Wartość
Udział (%)
RAZEM
100%
Wycena
Ostatnia cena zakupu Średnia cena magazynowa
XFCANCELOKBUTTONS(fok,fcancel)
